parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: 'Unauthorized', message: 'Invalid or missing X-Webhook-Secret header' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ error: 'Bad Request', message: 'customer_email, subject, and body are required' }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO support_tickets (customer_email, subject, body, status, source, external_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'new', $4, $5) RETURNING id, customer_email, subject, body, source

options.systemMessage: You are a B2B customer support classifier. Respond with valid JSON only.

parameters.query: UPDATE support_tickets SET category = $1, priority = $2, confidence_score = $3, ai_summary = $4, status = $5, assigned_to = $6, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $7 RETURNING id, customer_email, category, priority
INSERT INTO audit_logs (ticket_id, workflow_step, model_version, input_hash, output_json, execution_time_ms) VALUES ($1, 'classification', $2, $3, $4::jsonb, $5)

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Apply Business Rules').first().json.ticket_id }},={{ $('Apply Business Rules').first().json.model_version }},={{ $('Apply Business Rules').first().json.input_hash }},={{ JSON.stringify($('Apply Business Rules').first().json.ai_output) }},=0

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ticket_id: $('Apply Business Rules').first().json.ticket_id, priority: $('Apply Business Rules').first().json.priority, category: $('Apply Business Rules').first().json.category, status: 'classified' }) }}
